name: Barren World
desc: This partially-terraformed world is barren and inhospitable. However, cutting-edge agricultural techniques have been successful at wringing out a small amount of farming production from the hellish landscape.

name: Hostile Xenosphere
desc: Any attempt at low-orbit or atmospheric colonization of $market is nearly impossible, due to constant corrosion from nanites, attacks from larger entities, and communication problems from everpresent electromagnetic noise.

name: Extraspatial Contamination
desc: $market is utterly hostile to any form of temporary or sustained occupation. The planet is surrounded in a field of high-energy particles that constantly flow between border dimensions through n-space, ignoring conventional physical barriers. Surface-to-space communication is impossible, and long-term human habitation is a death sentence.
